narrative:
Harrison Twp. township has 10,446 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
